tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def incidents (filter #(= (:status %) "triggered") (pagerduty_incidents {:urgency "high"})))
(if (empty? incidents)
  (do (insert! :slack_messages {:channel "incidents" :text "All clear."}) "posted to Slack")
  (do (insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Triage" :body (clojure.string/join "\n" (map :id incidents))}) "sent email"))
(count incidents)"}
